title: Event Envelope
description: The 11-field event envelope. Every event in Datarun carries this structure. Fields are finalized across 5 ADRs — no additions without ADR-level decision.

id.description: Client-generated UUID. Globally unique. Used for deduplication.

type.description: Platform-fixed, closed, append-only vocabulary. Domain meaning lives in shapes, not types.

shape_ref.description: Mandatory. Format: {shape_name}/v{version}. References the shape definition that governs the payload.

activity_ref.description: Optional. References the activity this event belongs to. Null when shape alone disambiguates.

type.description: One of four typed identity categories.

subject_ref.description: The entity this event is about. Typed identity reference.

type.description: Actor type. System actors use 'system:{source_type}/{source_id}' format in the id field.

id.description: UUID for human actors. 'system:{source_type}/{source_id}' for system actors.

device_id.description: Hardware-bound identifier. Generated on first app launch, persisted.

device_seq.description: Monotonically increasing integer per device. Causal ordering within a device.

sync_watermark.description: Server-assigned on receipt. Null until synced. Used for pull pagination.

timestamp.description: Device clock, ISO 8601. Advisory only — not used for ordering.

payload.description: Shape-conforming JSON object. Structure defined by shape_ref.
